DBZ Unlimited: Downloads
 

DOWNLOADS: Here is a small collection of downloads. For now all I have to offer is a couple of wavs but I'll try to update this page as often as I can. Next to each wav file you'll find a name in bold(the character saying it) and in quotes is what the character says. to save the wav file rightclcik and select "save as."

WAV. FILES:

destdisc.wavKrillin "Destructo Disk"
flyface.wavYamcha "You want some of this fly face?"
newcrusr.wavYamcha "You guys caused that big explosion!"
yippie.wavGokou "Yippie"
kamecha.wavGohan "Kame Attack"
itsgreen.wavRaditz "Excuse me has anyone seen my arm? You can't miss it. It's green!"
testinme.wavGokou "King Kai is testing me."
